character: Young woman, mid-20s, athletic build, light skin, shoulder-length dark brown hair, loose and natural. Pastel pink oversized hoodie, light grey joggers

crying.scene: In parked car, crying, daytime parking lot visible through windows
crying.video_prompt: She is crying. Eyes well up with subtle tears, lower lip trembles, tears slowly roll down her cheeks. One hand rises near her face. Subtle emotional movement, background stays still.
crying.start: Eyes slightly watery, lip trembling, brow furrowed, mascara smudged, sitting in car with seatbelt on
crying.peak: Tears streaming down cheeks, eyes red and puffy, mouth open in a sob, free hand wiping eyes, hunched forward

eating.scene: Sitting at small kitchen table, messy weekday lunch, afternoon light
eating.video_prompt: She picks up the spoon, scoops food from the bowl, and takes a bite. She chews slowly and naturally. Smooth hand movements, background stays still.
eating.start: Relaxed expression, free hand holding a spoon, kitchen table and bowl of fruits visible below in background
eating.peak: Free hand holding spoon of food up near her mouth mid-bite, eyes half-closed in enjoyment, looking at camera

cutting_fruits.scene: Standing in kitchen, bright afternoon light
cutting_fruits.video_prompt: She picks up the knife and carefully slices a piece of fruit on the cutting board. Smooth precise hand movements. She places the sliced piece aside. Background stays still.
cutting_fruits.start: Casual smile, free hand holding a piece of fruit, kitchen counter and cutting board visible behind her
cutting_fruits.peak: Free hand holding up a freshly cut piece of fruit toward camera, slight smile of satisfaction
